title: End-to-end pipeline for Parameter Golf lane_3: data flows from training data int
caption: End-to-end pipeline for Parameter Golf lane_3: data flows from training data into a float32 teacher model and a student model that undergoes staged QAT. Show (1) float-only training segment, (2) QAT phase with fake-quant nodes, (3) roundtrip path where student weights/activations are quantized to int8 and then compressed with zlib, and (4) evaluation of post-roundtrip val_bpb under a 16MB artifact cap and ≤1.10× runtime constraint. Annotate where loss terms L_task, KD loss, quantization error loss, and compression-aware losses plug into the training loop.
label: fig:pipeline_overview_1

title: Diagram of the compression-teacher distillation setup (Hypothesis 1). Show a flo
caption: Diagram of the compression-teacher distillation setup (Hypothesis 1). Show a float teacher network producing logits and (optionally) feature maps for distillation, alongside a student network that passes through fake-quant nodes to approximate int8. Highlight selected tensors (e.g., final-layer weights or activations) that are routed through a zlib compress/decompress block during training to compute L_zlib. Illustrate computation of teacher-relative compressibility target alpha and the additional L_comp term, then aggregation into L_total = L_task + lambda_kd * L_KD + lambda_comp * L_comp.
label: fig:architecture_diagram_2

title: Flowchart for compression-biased stochastic gating (Hypothesis 2). Steps: (1) pe
caption: Flowchart for compression-biased stochastic gating (Hypothesis 2). Steps: (1) periodically sample a minibatch, quantize per-channel activations, and pass channel-wise bytes through zlib to get bpb_c; (2) update EMA statistics h_c for each channel/head; (3) for each training step, compute p_drop(c) from h_c relative to the mean compressibility, sample binary gates g_c, and apply them to activations; (4) in inference, all gates fixed to 1 (no gating). Include annotations that this operates only during QAT, does not change the deployed graph, and consumes sparse zlib calls.
label: fig:method_flowchart_3

title: Effect of QAT + Roundtrip-Aware Compression on Validation bpb
caption: Comparison of validation bits-per-byte (val_bpb) between the float-only baseline and the proposed staged QAT with int8+zlib roundtrip alignment under the same gate budget. Lower val_bpb indicates better compression performance, directly testing the hypothesis that roundtrip-aware QAT improves post-roundtrip validation compression quality versus float-only training.
label: fig:fig_main_results_val_bpb

title: Runtime Overhead and Quick-Gate Constraint
caption: Runtime comparison between the float-only baseline and the proposed QAT + roundtrip-aware compression lane, showing absolute runtime (ms) and the runtime ratio relative to baseline. A dashed reference line at 1.10× indicates the quick-gate threshold; bars above this line would violate the runtime constraint, while the quick_gate_passed indicator confirms whether the candidate configuration satisfies the artifact limit of ≤1.10× baseline runtime.
label: fig:fig_runtime_quick_gate

title: Illustration of evaluation constraints and metrics. Show a schematic comparing b
caption: Illustration of evaluation constraints and metrics. Show a schematic comparing baseline float-only + post-hoc quantization vs multiple QAT variants (standard QAT+distillation, codec-guided QAT, compression-biased gating). For each, depict the measurement points for val_bpb after int8+zlib roundtrip, runtime (with a 1.10× quick-gate threshold), and artifact size with a 16MB cap. Emphasize that all methods share the same architecture and int8 scheme and are judged in terms of post-roundtrip behavior.
label: fig:concept_illustration_4

title: Change in Validation bpb Relative to Baseline
caption: Delta in validation bits-per-byte (delta_bpb) for the QAT + roundtrip-aware method relative to the float-only baseline, where negative values correspond to an improvement in compression. This figure isolates the net effect size of the proposed lane on val_bpb, complementing the absolute metrics in the main results figure.
label: fig:fig_delta_bpb_improvement
